user.title: Clever Caravan Location
user.description: Pick the type of location source.

usb.title: USB GPS dongle
usb.description: Pick the GPS device. Detected USB serial devices appear in the dropdown — if your dongle isn't listed, type the path manually (typically /dev/serial/by-id/usb-...).

entities.title: Source entities
entities.description: Point the integration at the lat/lon (and optionally elevation/speed) entities your {source} setup exposes.

abort.already_configured: Clever Caravan Location is already configured (only one instance is supported).

options.usb: USB GPS dongle (plugged into HA host)
options.entity: Entity-based (Starlink, device tracker, MQTT GPS sensors)
